hero.title: Italian Organic Mixes. Made Simple.
hero.subtitle: イタリアのオーガニックミックス。シンプルに、手作りを。
hero.body: Bring the authentic taste of Tuscany to your kitchen. Just add oil and water to our premium pre-mixed jars.

features.title: Zero Waste. 100% Taste.
features.subtitle: Sustainable, delicious. Premium Italian ingredients packed into Japanese glass jars.

hero.title: The Art of Jar Mixes
hero.subtitle: エセンツァ：瓶詰めの芸術
hero.body: Bringing the authentic taste of Italian organic farming to your Japanese kitchen. Simple, sustainable, and purely delicious.

mission.title: Zero Waste, Full Taste
mission.body: Our mission is simple: reduce waste without compromising on flavor. Every jar is designed to be reused, refilled, or returned.

origin.title: Born in Italy, Loved in Japan
origin.titleJa: イタリア生まれ、日本育ち
origin.body: Every jar begins its journey in the sun-drenched fields of Tuscany and Emilia-Romagna, where our partner farmers grow certified organic ingredients with generations of tradition.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.card1Body: Certified organic ingredients free from pesticides and GMOs.
philosophy.card2Body: Plant-based recipes that are kind to your body and the planet.
philosophy.card3Body: Every jar is layered by hand with precision and care.

quote.text: We believe that true luxury lies in simplicity. Knowing where your food comes from, and knowing that it caused no harm to the earth.
quote.author: Giulia & Kenji

hero.title: How It Works
hero.subtitle: Authentic Italian organic mixes delivered to your kitchen.
hero.subtitleJa: 本場イタリアのオーガニックミックスを、あなたのキッチンへお届けします。

process.title: Bringing Italy to You
process.subtitle: Our simple 3-step process ensures you get the freshest ingredients with minimal effort.

steps.step1TitleJa: お好みのミックスを選ぶ
steps.step1Body: Select from our curated range of organic cakes, cookies, soups, and more.
steps.step1BodyJa: ケーキ、クッキー、スープなど、厳選されたオーガニック製品からお選びください。
steps.step2Body: Just add fresh wet ingredients like eggs, oil, or water to the mix.
steps.step2BodyJa: 卵、油、水などの新鮮な液体材料を加えるだけ。
steps.step3Body: Enjoy healthy, organic, and delicious Italian flavors with your family and friends.
steps.step3BodyJa: ヘルシーでオーガニック、そして美味しいイタリアの味をお楽しみください。

shipping.title: Delivery to Your Door
shipping.subtitle: Reliable, chilled shipping across all of Japan.
shipping.tempBody: Depending on the season and the mix content, we utilize Cool Ta-Q-Bin (クール宅急便) to ensure your products arrive fresh and perfectly preserved.

hero.title: Shop Our Mixes
hero.subtitle: Premium organic ingredients in a jar. Crafted in Italy, enjoyed in Japan.
hero.subtitleJa: 瓶に詰まった、プレミアムオーガニック食材。

newsletter.title: Join the èSenza Lifestyle
newsletter.subtitle: Get free recipes, exclusive discounts, and tips on sustainable living.

product.sustainabilityBody: Our jars are 100% glass with metal lids. Reuse them for your pantry or recycle them endlessly.
product.storageNote: Store in a cool, dry place. Best consumed within 6 months of opening.

footer.tagline: Organic mixes. Simple, sustainable, and straight from Italy.

newsletter.title: Join the Family
newsletter.subtitle: Get recipes, sustainability tips, and exclusive offers straight to your inbox.
